miniapp.name: Chancy
miniapp.subtitle: Onchain tile-reveal game
miniapp.description: Trustless P2P tile-reveal on Base. Hosts fund prize pots. Players pay per tile. Dodge bombs, collect prizes, sweep the pot.
miniapp.ogDescription: Trustless P2P tile-reveal on Base. Hosts fund prize pots. Players pay per tile. Dodge bombs, collect prizes, sweep the pot.
